title: Sweet and Crispy French Corn Salad
description: This low-sodium-friendly sweet corn salad combines the chewy texture of corn with a light dressing to create a refreshing side dish or light meal.

ingredients.name: low-sodium crumbled feta cheese
ingredients.notes: optional for added creaminess but not essential

instructions: Wash the sweetcorn and slice it into small pieces.
Toast croutons until golden brown. Allow them to cool slightly before using.
In a large bowl, combine sliced sweetcorn, toasted croutons, chopped fresh herbs, diced cucumber, and crumbled feta (if using).
In a separate small bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper together until well combined. Drizzle the dressing over the corn salad mixture.
Toss all ingredients gently to combine evenly.
Allow the salad to sit for about 10 minutes before serving to let flavors meld together.
